changes.reason: The weak no-0DTE slice is breakout_long_no_0dte in STALE_0DTE: only 2 trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. A slope step from 0.08 to 0.10 tests whether stale/expired breakout fallback should require stronger ES-only continuation before carrying heat.

Raise the ES-only breakout fallback structure requirement from 4 to 5. This keeps VALID_0DTE profiles untouched and targets only fallback entries where the option map is unavailable or stale, so it should not damage the core pullback/charm-pin/squeeze edges.

The stale breakout fallback is low-efficiency but the expired 0DTE winner had large MFE. Increasing TP from 3 to 4 tests whether the fallback should only participate when the ES continuation is strong enough to pay for the data-state uncertainty.

expected_effect: Should reduce low-efficiency stale breakout fallback exposure and improve no-0DTE risk-adjusted quality without touching VALID_0DTE engines. Main risk is losing the small but positive breakout_long_no_0dte contribution; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001 or fallback PnL/exposure does not improve.
label: no-0dte-breakout-quality-holdout
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_g_missing_0dte_policy_adapted. The current leader should not be altered with more global vetoes, call-wall expansion, 1DTE tightening, or duplicate squeeze/charm-wall TP tests. The weakest isolated data-state edge is breakout_long_no_0dte under STALE_0DTE, which is positive but inefficient and tail-heavy relative to other fallback slices. This is a profile-local ES-only quality holdout for missing/stale/expired 0DTE behavior, preserving all VALID_0DTE option-confirmed profiles.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: breakout_long_no_0dte produced 2 STALE_0DTE trades with only $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE, while the EXPIRED_0DTE trade was strong but only one sample. This suggests fallback breakout needs stronger ES continuation confirmation rather than broad routing changes.
strategy_hypotheses.name: No-0DTE Breakout Quality Holdout
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample; stricter ES slope/structure may remove profitable fallback insurance and lower total net profit more than it improves exposure quality.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE map missing, stale, thin, or expired with breakout_long_no_0dte routed as ES-only fallback.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: No-0DTE fallback PnL/exposure improves, fallback worst MAE does not worsen, VALID_0DTE PnL is unchanged, total net profit remains >=98% of run_001, and completed trades decline <=10%.

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -527, total PnL retention >=97%, protected extended-VWAP winner PnL retention >=90%.
